title: Non-text Content
logic: Check if img tags have alt attributes.
fix_suggestion: Add an alt attribute describing the image content or use alt='' if decorative.

title: Audio-only and Video-only (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if audio-only and video-only content has text alternatives or transcripts.
fix_suggestion: Provide transcripts or text alternatives for all audio-only and video-only content.

title: Captions (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if prerecorded audio in video has captions.
fix_suggestion: Add captions to all prerecorded video content.

title: Audio Description or Media Alternative (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if prerecorded video has audio description or transcript.
fix_suggestion: Provide audio description or full transcript for prerecorded video content.

title: Captions (Live)
logic: Check if live audio has captions.
fix_suggestion: Provide real-time captions for all live audio content.

title: Audio Description (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if prerecorded video has audio description.
fix_suggestion: Add audio description track to prerecorded video content.

title: Sign Language (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if prerecorded audio content has sign language interpretation.
fix_suggestion: Provide sign language interpretation for prerecorded audio content.

title: Extended Audio Description (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if video with insufficient pauses has extended audio description.
fix_suggestion: Provide extended audio description or alternative version with sufficient pauses.

title: Media Alternative (Prerecorded)
logic: Check if prerecorded video has full transcript alternative.
fix_suggestion: Provide comprehensive transcript for all prerecorded multimedia content.

title: Audio-only (Live)
logic: Check if live audio-only content has text alternative or transcript.
fix_suggestion: Provide live transcript or text alternative for live audio content.

title: Info and Relationships
logic: Check proper heading hierarchy and semantic structure.
fix_suggestion: Ensure headings follow a logical, sequential order and use semantic HTML.

title: Meaningful Sequence
logic: Check if reading order is meaningful and logical.
fix_suggestion: Ensure DOM order matches visual order for proper reading sequence.

title: Sensory Characteristics
logic: Check if instructions don't rely solely on shape, size, visual location, or sound.
fix_suggestion: Provide text-based instructions along with sensory descriptors.

title: Orientation
logic: Check if content works in both portrait and landscape orientations.
fix_suggestion: Support both portrait and landscape orientations or explain why not possible.

title: Identify Input Purpose
logic: Check if input fields have proper autocomplete attributes identifying purpose.
fix_suggestion: Add autocomplete attributes to identify the purpose of input fields.

title: Identify Purpose
logic: Check if purpose of UI components and icons is identified in the DOM.
fix_suggestion: Use ARIA labels or text to identify the purpose of UI components.

title: Use of Color
logic: Check if color is not the only means of conveying information.
fix_suggestion: Add patterns, text, or other visual indicators in addition to color.

title: Audio Control
logic: Check if audio playing automatically can be paused or muted.
fix_suggestion: Provide pause/stop controls for automatically playing audio.

title: Contrast (Minimum)
logic: Check if text and background colors have a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
fix_suggestion: Adjust text or background colors to meet minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio.

title: Resize Text
logic: Check if text can be resized up to 200% without loss of functionality.
fix_suggestion: Use relative font sizes and ensure layout adapts to text resizing.

title: Images of Text
logic: Check if images of text are avoided except for logos or essential formatting.
fix_suggestion: Use actual text instead of images of text whenever possible.

title: Contrast (Enhanced)
logic: Check if text has enhanced contrast ratio of at least 7:1.
fix_suggestion: Increase contrast ratio to meet enhanced 7:1 requirement.

title: Low or No Background Audio
logic: Check if background audio is minimized or can be turned off.
fix_suggestion: Reduce background audio volume or provide a mute control.

title: Visual Presentation
logic: Check if text presentation includes line spacing, paragraph spacing, and column width.
fix_suggestion: Improve visual presentation with proper spacing and line lengths.

title: Images of Text (No Exception)
logic: Check if images of text are completely avoided.
fix_suggestion: Replace all images of text with actual HTML text.

title: Reflow
logic: Check if content reflows without horizontal scrolling at 1280px viewport.
fix_suggestion: Use responsive design to ensure content reflows properly without scrolling.

title: Non-text Contrast
logic: Check if UI components and graphical elements have at least 3:1 contrast.
fix_suggestion: Ensure UI elements have sufficient contrast against adjacent colors.

title: Text Spacing
logic: Check if content remains functional when text spacing is increased.
fix_suggestion: Use flexible layouts that adapt to increased line spacing and word spacing.

title: Content on Hover or Focus
logic: Check if content appearing on hover is dismissible, hoverable, and persistent.
fix_suggestion: Make tooltips/popovers dismissible via Escape and hoverable without disappearing.

title: Keyboard
logic: Check if all interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard.
fix_suggestion: Ensure all functionality is accessible via keyboard alone.

title: No Keyboard Trap
logic: Check if keyboard focus is not trapped in any element.
fix_suggestion: Ensure users can tab out of all interactive elements.

title: Keyboard (No Exception)
logic: Check if all content is keyboard accessible with no exceptions.
fix_suggestion: Provide complete keyboard accessibility for all content.

title: Character Key Shortcuts
logic: Check if character key shortcuts can be disabled or remapped.
fix_suggestion: Allow users to disable or remap character key shortcuts.

title: Timing Adjustable
logic: Check if time-limited sessions can be adjusted or extended.
fix_suggestion: Allow users to extend or disable session timeouts.

title: Pause, Stop, Hide
logic: Check if moving, blinking, scrolling, or auto-updating content can be paused.
fix_suggestion: Provide pause/stop controls for animated or auto-updating content.

title: No Timing
logic: Check if no essential timing is used in the content.
fix_suggestion: Redesign interactions that rely on specific timing.

title: Interruptions
logic: Check if interruptions like alerts can be postponed or suppressed.
fix_suggestion: Allow users to defer or suppress non-emergency interruptions.

title: Re-authenticating
logic: Check if user data is preserved when re-authenticating.
fix_suggestion: Preserve user data during re-authentication or provide clear warning.

title: Timeouts
logic: Check if users are warned before timeout and can extend.
fix_suggestion: Warn users before timeout and allow them to extend the session.

title: Three Flashes or Below Threshold
logic: Check if content doesn't flash more than 3 times per second.
fix_suggestion: Reduce flashing content to below 3 flashes per second threshold.

title: Three Flashes
logic: Check if content never flashes more than 3 times per second.
fix_suggestion: Eliminate all flashing at 3+ times per second.

title: Animation from Interactions
logic: Check if animations triggered by interactions can be disabled.
fix_suggestion: Allow users to disable animations from interactions.

title: Bypass Blocks
logic: Check if a 'skip to main content' link is provided.
fix_suggestion: Add a hidden skip link at the top of the page that becomes visible on focus.

title: Page Titled
logic: Check if the document has a non-empty title tag.
fix_suggestion: Provide a descriptive title tag for the HTML document.

title: Focus Order
logic: Check if the navigation focus order is logical and intuitive.
fix_suggestion: Ensure the DOM order matches the visual order for logical keyboard navigation.

title: Link Purpose (In Context)
logic: Check if links have descriptive text or aria-labels.
fix_suggestion: Ensure links contain text that describes their purpose.

title: Multiple Ways
logic: Check if multiple navigation methods are provided (search, sitemap, etc).
fix_suggestion: Provide search, site map, or table of contents for navigation.

title: Headings and Labels
logic: Check if headings and labels describe topic or purpose.
fix_suggestion: Use descriptive headings and labels that clearly identify content.

title: Focus Visible
logic: Check if keyboard focus indicator is always visible.
fix_suggestion: Ensure all interactive elements have visible focus indicators.

title: Location
logic: Check if user's location within site is indicated.
fix_suggestion: Provide breadcrumbs or other location indicators.

title: Link Purpose (Link Only)
logic: Check if link text alone describes the link's purpose.
fix_suggestion: Use descriptive link text that is clear in context.

title: Section Headings
logic: Check if section headings are used throughout the page.
fix_suggestion: Organize content with descriptive section headings.

title: Pointer Gestures
logic: Check if functionality is not limited to path-based or multi-point gestures.
fix_suggestion: Provide alternative single-point gesture or button-based alternatives.

title: Pointer Cancellation
logic: Check if pointer down events don't trigger essential functions.
fix_suggestion: Use pointer up events for triggering actions instead of pointer down.

title: Label in Name
logic: Check if visible label text is included in the accessible name.
fix_suggestion: Ensure accessible names include the visible label text.

title: Motion Actuation
logic: Check if motion-triggered functionality has an alternative.
fix_suggestion: Provide button or alternative for motion-triggered actions.

title: Target Size (Enhanced)
logic: Check if touch targets are at least 44x44 CSS pixels.
fix_suggestion: Increase touch target size to at least 44x44 pixels.

title: Concurrent Input Mechanisms
logic: Check if all input methods work simultaneously.
fix_suggestion: Ensure touch, mouse, and keyboard inputs all work together.

title: Language of Page
logic: Check if html tag has a lang attribute.
fix_suggestion: Add a lang attribute to the html tag, e.g., lang='en'.

title: Language of Parts
logic: Check if passages in different languages have lang attributes.
fix_suggestion: Add lang attributes to elements containing text in different languages.

title: Unusual Words
logic: Check if unusual words or abbreviations are defined.
fix_suggestion: Define technical terms, abbreviations, and unusual words.

title: Abbreviations
logic: Check if abbreviations are expanded or defined.
fix_suggestion: Provide full text for abbreviations using abbr tags or definitions.

title: Reading Level
logic: Check if reading level is appropriate or lower secondary level.
fix_suggestion: Simplify language to lower secondary school reading level.

title: Pronunciation
logic: Check if pronunciation is provided for ambiguous words.
fix_suggestion: Provide pronunciation information for words with ambiguous pronunciation.

title: On Focus
logic: Check if focus doesn't automatically cause unexpected context changes.
fix_suggestion: Avoid triggering major changes when elements receive focus.

title: On Input
logic: Check if changing input settings doesn't automatically cause context change.
fix_suggestion: Provide a submit button or warning before applying changes.

title: Consistent Navigation
logic: Check if navigation elements appear in the same order on all pages.
fix_suggestion: Keep navigation consistent across all pages.

title: Consistent Identification
logic: Check if components with same functionality are identified consistently.
fix_suggestion: Use consistent labels and identification for similar components.

title: Change on Request
logic: Check if context changes occur only when requested by user.
fix_suggestion: Restrict context changes to explicit user actions.

title: Error Identification
logic: Check if form errors are identified and described in text.
fix_suggestion: Clearly identify form errors and describe what went wrong.

title: Labels or Instructions
logic: Check if all form inputs have associated labels or instructions.
fix_suggestion: Ensure every input element has a corresponding label or instruction.

title: Error Suggestion
logic: Check if error suggestions are provided for invalid input.
fix_suggestion: Provide helpful error suggestions and correction options.

title: Error Prevention (Legal, Financial, Data)
logic: Check if submissions are reversible, checked, or confirmed.
fix_suggestion: Provide confirmation for submissions of legal/financial transactions.

title: Help
logic: Check if context-sensitive help is available.
fix_suggestion: Provide contextual help and instructions for form fields.

title: Error Prevention (All)
logic: Check if submissions are reversible, checked, or confirmed for all pages.
fix_suggestion: Implement error prevention for all user submissions.

title: Parsing
logic: Check if HTML is valid with no duplicate IDs.
fix_suggestion: Fix HTML validation errors and ensure unique element IDs.

title: Name, Role, Value
logic: Check if custom controls have correct ARIA roles, states, and properties.
fix_suggestion: Use appropriate ARIA attributes for custom widgets.

title: Status Messages
logic: Check if status messages are announced to screen readers via ARIA live regions.
fix_suggestion: Use aria-live regions to announce status messages.

title: Minimum Contrast (Non-text)
logic: Check if non-text content has at least 3:1 contrast.
fix_suggestion: Ensure graphical elements have sufficient contrast.

title: Dragging Movements
logic: Check if dragging functionality has single-pointer alternative.
fix_suggestion: Provide button-based alternative for drag operations.

title: Target Size (Minimum)
logic: Check if touch targets are at least 24x24 CSS pixels.
fix_suggestion: Increase touch target size to at least 24x24 pixels.

title: Consistent Help
logic: Check if help mechanisms appear in consistent locations.
fix_suggestion: Place help features in consistent locations across pages.

title: Redundant Entry
logic: Check if information previously entered is not re-requested.
fix_suggestion: Pre-fill forms with previously entered information when possible.

title: Accessible Authentication
logic: Check if authentication does not rely on cognitive functions.
fix_suggestion: Provide accessible authentication methods like passwords, 2FA alternatives.

title: Semantic Clarity
logic: Analyze button/link text to ensure it clearly describes the destination or action.
fix_suggestion: Rewrite vague text to be descriptive and context-independent.

title: Readability and Plain Language
logic: Analyze text content for complex jargon, overly long sentences, and readability.
fix_suggestion: Simplify language to make it understandable for a wider audience.

title: ARIA Usage Semantics
logic: Check if aria-labels and roles actually make sense in context.
fix_suggestion: Correct the ARIA label or role to match the element's actual purpose.

title: UX Accessibility
logic: Analyze forms, navigation labels, and UI components for accessibility.
fix_suggestion: Improve accessibility name or description of UI elements.

title: Image Alt Text Quality
logic: Analyze alt text quality and relevance to image content.
fix_suggestion: Provide more descriptive alt text that accurately conveys image content.

title: Non-Text Contrast for Controls
logic: Check contrast between user interface components and adjacent colors for minimum contrast.
fix_suggestion: Ensure interactive controls have sufficient contrast against adjacent colors.

title: High Contrast Mode Support
logic: Check if site respects user agent or OS high-contrast settings.
fix_suggestion: Support or provide styles that respond to user high-contrast preferences.

title: Dark Mode Accessibility
logic: Check color usage and contrast in dark theme implementations.
fix_suggestion: Ensure dark themes maintain minimum contrast and clear focus indicators.

title: Accessible Drag and Drop
logic: Check if drag-and-drop functionality has keyboard-accessible alternatives and announcements.
fix_suggestion: Provide keyboard operations and ARIA live feedback for drag-and-drop actions.

title: Accessible Gesture Hints
logic: Check if touch gestures are explained and alternatives are provided.
fix_suggestion: Document gestures and provide single-tap or button alternatives.

title: Consistent Link Appearance
logic: Check if links are visually distinguishable and consistent across the site.
fix_suggestion: Use consistent styles for links and ensure underlines or other visual cues.

title: Skip to Navigation
logic: Check for presence and focusability of skip-to-navigation links.
fix_suggestion: Provide keyboard-focusable skip links to main navigation sections.

title: Accessible Virtual Keyboard
logic: Check if on-screen keyboards are operable with assistive technologies and keyboard-only input.
fix_suggestion: Ensure virtual keyboards expose proper roles and are keyboard-navigable.

title: Clear Language Selection
logic: Check if language selection is discoverable and indicated in the DOM.
fix_suggestion: Expose language selection controls with clear labels and `lang` attributes when changing content language.

title: Predictable Layout
logic: Check if the layout does not change unexpectedly during interactions.
fix_suggestion: Avoid reflowing major layout components on minor interactions or provide warnings.

title: Accessible Error Recovery
logic: Check if users can recover easily from mistakes with clear instructions and undo options.
fix_suggestion: Provide undo, drafts, or confirmation steps and explain how to recover from errors.

title: Semantic HTML
logic: Check if semantic HTML elements (nav, main, header) are used correctly.
fix_suggestion: Replace generic containers with appropriate semantic elements to improve accessibility.

title: Accessible ARIA Patterns
logic: Check if ARIA roles, states, and properties follow recommended patterns.
fix_suggestion: Use ARIA patterns from authoritative sources and avoid role misuse.

title: Contrast Exceptions and Context
logic: Analyze whether perceived contrast meets requirements in realistic contexts (shadows, overlays).
fix_suggestion: Adjust design elements like shadows and overlays to preserve perceptible contrast.

title: Form Flow and Grouping
logic: Analyze form layout for logical grouping and proper use of fieldset/legend.
fix_suggestion: Group related fields using `fieldset` and `legend` and ensure tab order follows logical flow.

title: Table Semantics and Headers
logic: Analyze tables for proper header cells, scope attributes and linearization for screen readers.
fix_suggestion: Add `th`, `scope`, and summaries or captions to complex tables.

title: Media Player Accessibility
logic: Analyze custom media players for keyboard support, labels, and accessible controls.
fix_suggestion: Ensure media players expose standard controls and accessible labels.

title: Keyboard Shortcut Conflicts
logic: Analyze application-defined keyboard shortcuts for conflicts and discoverability.
fix_suggestion: Provide a help page listing shortcuts and allow users to remap or disable them.

title: Focus Management
logic: Analyze focus shifts after dynamic content updates for predictability and visibility.
fix_suggestion: Ensure focus is moved to newly revealed content or an appropriate element and is visible.

title: Colorblindness Simulation
logic: Simulate common color vision deficiencies to identify problematic color encodings.
fix_suggestion: Avoid using color combinations that rely on distinctions not perceivable to people with color vision deficiencies.

title: Navigation Depth and Discoverability
logic: Analyze site navigation depth to ensure content is discoverable within few steps.
fix_suggestion: Flatten navigation, add search, and provide clear descriptive navigation labels.

title: Performance Impact on Accessibility
logic: Analyze whether slow loading or heavy CPU usage blocks assistive tech or keyboard users.
fix_suggestion: Optimize critical rendering paths and provide progress indicators for long tasks.

title: Security UX Accessibility
logic: Analyze security dialogs (CAPTCHAs, re-auth) for accessibility impacts.
fix_suggestion: Provide accessible alternatives to CAPTCHAs and clear instructions for secure flows.

title: Microcopy Clarity
logic: Scan UI microcopy for ambiguous terms like 'Submit' or 'OK' without context.
fix_suggestion: Replace ambiguous microcopy with descriptive actions e.g., 'Save changes'.

title: Compatibility with Assistive Technologies
logic: Check that dynamic widgets expose required APIs and semantics for popular ATs.
fix_suggestion: Test with major assistive technologies and ensure ARIA and semantic HTML interoperate correctly.

title: Localized Content Indicators
logic: Check that content language changes are indicated and marked in the DOM.
fix_suggestion: Use appropriate `lang` attributes on elements when language differs from document language.

title: Text Legibility
logic: Check for cramped text, small font sizes, and poor line-height impacting legibility.
fix_suggestion: Ensure sufficient base font size, line-height, and spacing for readability.

title: Descriptive Link and Button Keywords
logic: Analyze whether links and buttons use clear, descriptive keywords instead of generic words.
fix_suggestion: Replace generic keywords with descriptive terms that communicate destination or action.

title: Documentation and Help Coverage
logic: Check whether accessibility documentation, keyboard shortcuts, and help are discoverable.
fix_suggestion: Provide an accessibility statement, keyboard help, and documentation linked from the UI.

title: Voice Control Compatibility
logic: Analyze whether UI controls and labels are compatible with voice control recognition.
fix_suggestion: Use clear, short labels and ARIA names to improve voice control recognition.

title: Touch Target Feedback
logic: Check that touch interactions provide immediate visual or haptic feedback.
fix_suggestion: Provide clear feedback for touch actions (press states, animations) and ensure targets are large enough.
